database.Author: Christopher J. Sweeney et al.
database.Secondary Endpoint(s): Time to biochemical, symptomatic, or radiographic progression; rate of prostate-specific antigen (PSA) level of less than 0.2 ng per milliliter at 12 months; time to castration-resistant prostate cancer; time to clinical progression.
database.Treatment Arm 1 Regimen: ADT plus docetaxel (at a dose of 75 mg per square meter of body-surface area every 3 weeks for six cycles)
database.Type of Therapy: ADT plus docetaxel (at a dose of 75 mg per square meter of body-surface area every 3 weeks for six cycles) or ADT alone.
